title: M9 OpenClaw agent dogfood core workflow
user_task: As an OpenClaw orchestrator agent, run doctor, search, describe, expand, recommend, and dry-run using only installed loo_* gateway tools without reading raw transcripts.
expected_public_safe_evidence: called loo_* tool names and statuses
selected thread id or source refs
bounded expansion profile and token budget
plan, final message, or touched-file lookup status
agent recommendation derived from source refs and summaries
private_data_exclusions: raw OpenClaw gateway stdout or stderr
proof_boundary: Dry-run scenario contract for Codex-first gateway usability. It may prove agent handoff readiness for read/search/describe/expand/recommend/dry-run, but does not prove live Codex control, generic GUI mutation, Claude Code adapter parity, remote sync, or release-grade customer readiness.
next_action: Run `loo openclaw tool-smoke` with the M9 required tools and record only public-safe agentReasoning, source refs, hashes, counts, setup status, and blocker codes.
